@eslint-react/eslint-plugin.note: Required if you are using React.

@next/eslint-plugin-next.note: Required if you are using Next.js.

eslint-import-resolver-typescript.note: Required if you are using TypeScript.

eslint-plugin-lingui.note: Required if you are using LinguiJS.

eslint-plugin-react-hooks.note: Required if you are using React.

eslint-plugin-storybook.note: Required if you are using Storybook.

jiti.note: Required if you are using TypeScript (for evaluating eslint.config.ts).

prettier.note: We use prettier rules as part of EsLint, but it can also be ran separately.

typescript.note: Required if you are using TypeScript.

typescript-eslint.note: Required if you are using TypeScript.
